user_prompt: Customer is leaving for a competitor. Draft a polite acknowledgment with one optional check-in question, no aggressive retention.
actual_output:
Priority: MEDIUM
Category: Account Management - Cancellation

Draft response:

Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you for reaching out and letting us know about your decision. I’m sorry to see you go, but I completely understand that business needs change and you need to choose the solution that works best for your current workflow.

I have processed your cancellation request, and your access will remain active until the end of your current billing cycle on [Date]. You won't be charged again.

If you have a moment, would you be open to sharing one thing we could have done differently to better support your needs? We are always looking to improve, and your feedback would be very helpful.

We wish you the best of luck with your new tools. If you ever need assistance in the future, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,

Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the task as a customer support response drafting exercise and provided a professional, empathetic draft that followed all the user's constraints.
